content.problemStatement: There’s an array ‘A’ of size ‘N’ with an equal number of positive and negative elements. Without altering the relative order of positive and negative elements, you must return an array of alternately positive and negative values.
constraints: Array contains equal number of positive and negative integers
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer 'N' denoting the size of the array. The second line contains 'N' space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: The output will be 'N' space-separated integers representing the rearranged array.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Separate positive and negative numbers, then rearrange them in alternating order
